structured.name: Set DisplayMessage
structured.objective:
To enable a CSO to display additional messages on a Charging Station that are not part of the
firmware.
structured.description:
This use case describes how a CSO can set a message to be displayed on a Charging Station.
Depending on the given parameters the message shall be displayed a certain way and at a certain
moment on the Charging Station.
scenario: 1. The CSO configures the CSMS to send a request to set a new message.
2. The CSMS sends a SetDisplayMessageRequest message to the Charging Station.

3. The Charging Station accepts the request by sending a SetDisplayMessageResponse message
to the CSMS.
4. The Charging Station shows the new message on the display at the configured moment.
structured.prerequisites: No messages configured with the same IDs.
structured.postconditions:
The new message will be displayed on the Charging Station (time, duration and position
depending on configuration)
structured.remarks:
The maximum number of messages that can be stored in a Charging Station can be read by the
CSMS in the Configuration Variable:NumberOfDisplayMessages.maxLimit.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
MessageInfoType object via a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the priority of
the message is not supported by the Charging
Station
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send a
SetDisplayMessageResponse with status:
NotSupportedPriority.
(See configuration variable DisplayMessageSupportedPriorities
for supported priorities).

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
MessageInfoType object via a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the state of the
message is not supported by the Charging
Station
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send a
SetDisplayMessageResponse with status:
NotSupportedState.
(See configuration variable DisplayMessageSupportedStates for
supported states).

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
MessageInfoType object via a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the format of
the message is not supported by the Charging
Station
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send a
SetDisplayMessageResponse with status:
NotSupportedMessageFormat.
(See configuration variable DisplayMessageSupportedFormats
for supported formats).

When a CSMS sends a message to a Charging Station that does
not belong to a transaction, the field: transactionId in the
message field SHALL be omitted.

The CSMS MAY include a startTime and endTime when setting a
message.

The Charging Station SHALL NOT display the DisplayMessage
message before the startTime.

The Charging Station SHALL remove a DisplayMessage
message after the endTime.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station knows the language
preferences of the EV Driver
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL display the DisplayMessage
message in the preferred language, if available.

When no matching language is available, it is RECOMMENDED to
show a DisplayMessage message in English as fall-back, if
available.

The Charging Station SHALL store the messages in persistent
storage, so they survive a power cycle/reboot of the Charging
Station.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the total
number of messages after having handled this
request will exceed
NumberOfDisplayMessages.maxLimit.
requirements.definition: The Charging Station SHALL respond with status: Rejected.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the priority of
the message is NormalCycle
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL show this message at the
configured moment in the normal cycle of messages.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the priority of
the message is InFront
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL show this message at the
configured moment, regardless of the normal cycle of
messages.

requirements.precondition:
When multiple messages with priority InFront
are configured to be shown at the same time
requirements.definition: The Charging Station SHALL cycle these messages.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the priority of
the message is AlwaysFront
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL show this message at the
configured moment, regardless of other installed messages.
Hence, it shall not cycle it with other messages and the Charging
Station’s own messages shall not override this message.

requirements.precondition:
O01.FR.15 AND
Another message with priority AlwaysFront is
already set
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL replace the old message with the
newly set message.

Language SHALL be specified as RFC-5646 tags, see: [RFC5646],
example: US English is: "en-US"

requirements.precondition:
When Charging Station has multiple displays
AND
Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest without a display
element in its MessageInfoType
requirements.definition:
Charging Station SHOULD use the message for the main
display(s)

requirements.precondition:
When receiving a GetBaseReportRequest AND
Charging Station has one or more displays
requirements.definition:
Charging Station SHOULD include in the report a Display
component for every display it contains.

requirements.precondition:
When Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest with Display
element referencing an unknown Display in its
MessageInfoType
requirements.definition:
Charging Station SHOULD respond with a
SetDisplayMessageResponse with status = Rejected.

requirements.precondition:
When Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest with Display
element referencing a known Display in its
MessageInfoType
requirements.definition:
Charging Station SHOULD use the message only for the
specified display.

chunks.content:
# O01 - Set DisplayMessage

**Objective:** To enable a CSO to display additional messages on a Charging Station that are not part of the
firmware.

**Description:** This use case describes how a CSO can set a message to be displayed on a Charging Station.
Depending on the given parameters the message shall be displayed a certain way and at a certain
moment on the Charging Station.

**Actors:** CSO, CSMS, Charging Station

**Scenario:**
1. The CSO configures the CSMS to send a request to set a new message.
2. The CSMS sends a SetDisplayMessageRequest message to the Charging Station.
3. The Charging Station accepts the request by sending a SetDisplayMessageResponse message
to the CSMS.
4. The Charging Station shows the new message on the display at the configured moment.

**Prerequisites:** No messages configured with the same IDs.

**Postconditions:** The new message will be displayed on the Charging Station (time, duration and position
depending on configuration)

**Remarks:** The maximum number of messages that can be stored in a Charging Station can be read by the
CSMS in the Configuration Variable:NumberOfDisplayMessages.maxLimit.

# O01 - Requirements

**O01.FR.01**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
MessageInfoType object via a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the priority of
the message is not supported by the Charging
Station
The Charging Station SHALL send a
SetDisplayMessageResponse with status:
NotSupportedPriority.
(See configuration variable DisplayMessageSupportedPriorities
for supported priorities).

**O01.FR.02**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
MessageInfoType object via a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the state of the
message is not supported by the Charging
Station
The Charging Station SHALL send a
SetDisplayMessageResponse with status:
NotSupportedState.
(See configuration variable DisplayMessageSupportedStates for
supported states).

**O01.FR.03**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
MessageInfoType object via a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the format of
the message is not supported by the Charging
Station
The Charging Station SHALL send a
SetDisplayMessageResponse with status:
NotSupportedMessageFormat.
(See configuration variable DisplayMessageSupportedFormats
for supported formats).

**O01.FR.04**
When a CSMS sends a message to a Charging Station that does
not belong to a transaction, the field: transactionId in the
message field SHALL be omitted.

**O01.FR.05**
The CSMS MAY include a startTime and endTime when setting a
message.

**O01.FR.06**
Precondition: O01.FR.05
The Charging Station SHALL NOT display the DisplayMessage
message before the startTime.

**O01.FR.07**
Precondition: O01.FR.05
The Charging Station SHALL remove a DisplayMessage
message after the endTime.

**O01.FR.08**
Precondition: When the Charging Station knows the language
preferences of the EV Driver
The Charging Station SHALL display the DisplayMessage
message in the preferred language, if available.

**O01.FR.09**
Precondition: O01.FR.08
When no matching language is available, it is RECOMMENDED to
show a DisplayMessage message in English as fall-back, if
available.

**O01.FR.10**
The Charging Station SHALL store the messages in persistent
storage, so they survive a power cycle/reboot of the Charging
Station.

**O01.FR.11**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the total
number of messages after having handled this
request will exceed
NumberOfDisplayMessages.maxLimit.
The Charging Station SHALL respond with status: Rejected.

# O01 - Requirements (continued)

**O01.FR.12**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the priority of
the message is NormalCycle
The Charging Station SHALL show this message at the
configured moment in the normal cycle of messages.

**O01.FR.13**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the priority of
the message is InFront
The Charging Station SHALL show this message at the
configured moment, regardless of the normal cycle of
messages.

**O01.FR.14**
Precondition: When multiple messages with priority InFront
are configured to be shown at the same time
The Charging Station SHALL cycle these messages.

**O01.FR.15**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the priority of
the message is AlwaysFront
The Charging Station SHALL show this message at the
configured moment, regardless of other installed messages.
Hence, it shall not cycle it with other messages and the Charging
Station’s own messages shall not override this message.

**O01.FR.16**
Precondition: O01.FR.15 AND
Another message with priority AlwaysFront is
already set
The Charging Station SHALL replace the old message with the
newly set message.

**O01.FR.17**
Language SHALL be specified as RFC-5646 tags, see: [RFC5646],
example: US English is: "en-US"

**O01.FR.20**
Precondition: When Charging Station has multiple displays
AND
Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest without a display
element in its MessageInfoType
Charging Station SHOULD use the message for the main
display(s)

**O01.FR.21**
Precondition: When receiving a GetBaseReportRequest AND
Charging Station has one or more displays
Charging Station SHOULD include in the report a Display
component for every display it contains.

**O01.FR.22**
Precondition: When Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest with Display
element referencing an unknown Display in its
MessageInfoType
Charging Station SHOULD respond with a
SetDisplayMessageResponse with status = Rejected.

**O01.FR.23**
Precondition: When Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest with Display
element referencing a known Display in its
MessageInfoType
Charging Station SHOULD use the message only for the
specified display.
